productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Citi Pro Black Backpack
description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. At American Tourister we are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 45 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 16 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with a adjustable laptop sleeve One zipped compartment on the front with organizer sleeves, a zipped mesh pouch and a removable zipped pouchOne zipped side pocket and one asymmetric zipped pocket on the frontOne side bottle holder and a ear phones gate on the topHaul loop for easy carryingAn adjustable shoulder strap made of polyesterBranded zips and branding on the strapBack padding for comfort and branding in the form of legs at the baseCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
